notes: Memory-only Lite Demo package with one public skill.
v0.2.18 adds pressure-boundary pre-check cards for resumed, corrective, high-pressure, stable-module, rejected-path, and delivery-blocked work.
The pre-check is memory-layer discipline, not a new engineering protocol or repeated confirmation system.
Run Audit now records Pressure pre-check: green | yellow | red | not-triggered.
v0.1.7 remains available as the retained stable fallback.
